phase_name: Standalone debug + fix: VAC-crew unit duplication (+ poc PDF)

completed_tasks.name: Fix: unit-level cross-row reconciliation in group_source_rows + PII log marker
Verify on real WR 90922617 (read-only SKIP_UPLOAD dry run)
Address Codex review; finalize as units-required (revert unchecked-VAC widening)
Generate poc print PDF for WR 91029362 WE 060726

remaining_tasks.name: Sync local master to origin/master (it diverged)

blockers.description: Local master diverged from origin/master: 2 unpushed pre-session WIP commits (0ae1427, 86413d8) whose content was swept into the squash, plus pre-existing uncommitted .github/prompts edits. gh's post-merge auto-pull could not fast-forward.
blockers.workaround: git stash push -- .github/prompts/ ; git reset --hard origin/master ; git stash pop  (untracked poc/, generated_docs, .planning/debug survive reset). Do this deliberately after reviewing the .github/prompts edits.

human_actions_pending.context: A live token was pasted into the chat to run the read-only verification dry run; treat it as compromised.
Remote is correct (has the merged fix); local is stale. See blockers workaround.

decisions.decision: VAC-crew billing requires Units Completed? checked (same as the helper rule)
decisions.rationale: Operator confirmed VAC rows always have Units Completed checked in practice; avoids propagating a widened 'billable' definition through the Subproject-C attribution chain (bulk prefetch / claimer freeze / freeze_row).

decisions.decision: Exclusion is PER-UNIT (WR + week + Pole # + CU), NOT per-pole
decisions.rationale: A pole can hold both VAC-claimed and genuinely foreman-completed units; per-pole would strip the foreman's own units.
Operator requested merge so the next scheduled run uses the debugged code.

next_action: Rotate the exposed Smartsheet token. Then (optional) sync local master to origin/master per the blocker workaround. The VAC fix itself is complete and merged - nothing further required on it.
context_notes: VAC-crew duplicate-billing bug: a unit completed by the VAC crew appeared on BOTH the foreman/helper Excel and the VacCrew Excel because the WR spans two source sheets (one without VAC columns) so the same physical unit exists as two rows. Fix = a pre-pass in group_source_rows that collects (WR, week, Pole #, CU) of every __is_vac_crew row, then drops any non-VAC row with a matching unit identity from all non-VAC variants (continue), so the unit appears only on the VacCrew sheet. Net production diff vs baseline: that reconciliation + an 'EXCLUDING from foreman/helper' _PII_LOG_MARKERS entry. Verified on WR 90922617: foreman $30,023.63 -> $26,098.52 (the 3 VAC units), VacCrew unchanged, zero dups. Full debug record: .planning/debug/vac-crew-leak-foreman-sheet.md (status resolved). HARNESS NOTE: subagents here cannot execute shell/python (read-only only) - run pipeline/poc commands in the main context.
